MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-01-2021 - APPEARANCE VIA COURTCALL BY MICHELLE WEISS, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF DAVID BRODY; PRIYA NAVARATNASINGHAM, ESQ., PRESENT IN COURT, FOR DEFENDANT SONYA-MARIE OKUWA. THE COURT ASSIGNED A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO JUDGE ANGELA BRADSTREET IN DEPT. 624. PARTIES TO CONTACT DEPT. 624 VIA THE EMAIL ADDRESS OR PHONE NUMBER PROVIDED TO THEM AT TRIAL CALL REGARDING SCHEDULING OF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON JUN-16-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K.
